_note: SELF-HOST repurposing of the RE-RANK 08 schema (D21): each entry = one remaining PROMPT-BUILD/CR, not a product slice. done_sentinel = the disk path whose presence+validity+class-discriminator == that build shipped (orchestrator STEP-0 derived-state key; D14/D20 analog). roadmap_version 6 = operator-directed ledger refresh (2026-06-11) after W6-REAUTHOR-REST 03-hld + 02-adr phases shipped + committed (6171502). roadmap_version 7 = operator-directed actual-state sync (2026-06-11): per-phase progress within W6-REAUTHOR-REST reflected (01-roadmap done + clean-room-verified; 00-aprd CLASSIFIER shipped 1/9) + drift-class lesson (incl. field-NAME variant) + 04-build spot-check TODO integrated into this ledger from now-deleted ephemeral memory (disk = source of truth, D20). Refresh moves all shipped CR-002 entries (W0, W1-W5, W6-REAUTHOR-04BUILD, W1b) into completed[]; remaining_sequence now = the genuinely-unshipped builds only. SCOPED to the CR-002 deterministic-spine wave + the CR-003 registry-fidelity fix; prior delivered waves (greenfield 10, bugfix 8) live on disk (D20), not re-listed. Disk is source of truth — this ledger is informational ordering, not the truth the loop derives from. roadmap_version 8 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after 00-aprd GAP-DETECT re-authored + clean-room both-directions verified (5/9). roadmap_version 9 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after 00-aprd QUESTION-GEN re-authored + clean-room both-directions verified (6/9). roadmap_version 10 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after 00-aprd RECONCILE re-authored + clean-room both-directions verified (7/9). roadmap_version 11 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after 00-aprd SYNTHESIZE re-authored + clean-room both-directions verified (8/9). roadmap_version 12 = operator-directed sync (2026-06-11) after 00-aprd VERIFY (LAST role, 9/9) re-authored + clean-room both-directions verified -> W6-REAUTHOR-REST CLOSED, moved to completed[]. DERIVED FRONTIER now = W7-ORCH-SWAP (orchestrator STEP-4.1 resolve+prefill+compute swap). VERIFY lesson: input SEEDED on disk -> field-NAME drift class N/A to input; my Step-1 full input-schema enumeration was re-spec (AB3, ECONOMY-AUDIT caught, trimmed to structure-only — same RECONCILE lesson). Genuine relocation = OUTPUT verification-block shape, landed clean (0 starvation). Planted-defect required corrupting ALL 3 deprecation homes (discriminator + Rule 3 + Rule 3.1) for a conclusive FAIL; defect output schema-VALID yet value-WRONG re-confirms value-parity-not-schema-validity catches it. DERIVED FRONTIER = W6-REAUTHOR-REST (in progress): wave sentinel now prompts/00-aprd/VERIFY.md (still pre-CR) -> wave not done; per-phase disk scan shows 03-hld + 02-adr + 01-roadmap re-authored (done) + 00-aprd 8/9 (CLASSIFIER/CRITIQUE/EXTRACT/EXTRACT-RULES/GAP-DETECT/QUESTION-GEN/RECONCILE/SYNTHESIZE), so the NEXT + LAST role = VERIFY. RECONCILE = SECOND markdown-vs-no lesson: its INPUT is seeded on disk, so the field-NAME drift class does NOT apply to inputs (runner reads real keys) — relocating output-SHAPE cues (kind enum, corroboration, reconcile_meta tallies) into steps 3/4/5 is the genuine home; a full input-schema enumeration in Step 1 is re-spec (AB3, ECONOMY-AUDIT caught it, trimmed). NEW DRIFT SUB-CLASS (latent-ambiguity-unmasked): a dropped inline schema can also remove a worked-example whose number was STALE (topics_reconciled:9 vs golden 10) AND whose surrounding cue was vague enough to let the runner re-derive the wrong value; fix = sharpen the cue's derivation source (count from INPUT rules[], not agreed[]), never re-add the schema/example. Both-directions tooling re-confirmed: a tier-precedence defect was INEFFECTIVE until ALL redundant homes ('tier 1>2>3' + 'executable canon is least-surprise default' + the 2 leads) were corrupted consistently. QUESTION-GEN is the FIRST markdown-output role re-authored (output 05-questions.md has NO registry schema): outputs[].schema=null, the inline ## Output template is KEPT as the sole structural home (no JSON ## Output schema to drop -> the example-loss/field-NAME drift class did not apply to output; proactively relocated the INPUT field-names into Task-step-1 prose since the dropped inputs: format-prose was their home). Drift class NOT triggered (clean first-pass, like GAP-DETECT). NEW LESSON (both-directions tooling, not a prompt drift): a value-defect planted in only Rule2+step3 was INEFFECTIVE because the ≤6 cap is restated in the ## Output template (3 redundant prose homes) and the runner honored the template; a conclusive planted-defect FAIL required corrupting the cap in ALL homes (cap=4 -> 4Q+9assumptions vs golden 6Q+7assumptions). W1b-REGISTRY-ENRICH shipped (schemas.lock v2: description on every property, element shapes tightened). The example-loss drift class surfaced during 03-hld (a dropped inline-schema EXAMPLE carried derivation value W1b's descriptions did not; relocate to prompt prose, never re-add a schema) is now applied proactively per phase. DRIFT CLASS (durable, integrated from ephemeral notes): dropping an inline `## Output schema` can lose either a derivation-value EXAMPLE or the SOLE prose-home of output field NAMES; both pass registry validation yet drift clean-room value-parity vs golden. Fix = relocate the cue (which-fields + derivation logic) into Task-steps prose; never re-add a schema, never assume registry descriptions substitute. Field-NAME variant verified on 00-aprd CLASSIFIER (runner invented SR-001/verbatim/wrong escape shape until prose named the keys + id format). OUTSTANDING: W6-REAUTHOR-04BUILD spot-check for the same drift (it shipped before the class was understood).

remaining_sequence.rationale: Terminal sweep. Every prompt's lint + ECONOMY-AUDIT residue deferred per-wave during W6/W7 (defer-not-chase, avoids over-stripping the standalone-PART-A/B dual-mode design) is resolved to EXACTLY ONE of: (a) prompt DELETE/REWRITE — genuine AB1/AB7 debt; (b) prompts/_economy-audit.md Rule-2 calibration — a dual-mode standalone-Part restatement is sanctioned, NOT a duplicate (the auditor mis-fires, fix the auditor not the prompt, routes_to:canon); (c) lint-profile threshold note in the stack profile. Confirmed mis-fire seen in 03-hld: MODEL-DATA Register-block 'starvation' is a false positive (short Register is corpus convention). done_sentinel .roadmap/09-economy-reconcile.json records per-prompt lint verdict:clean + economy-audit verdict:clean across the whole corpus + a both-directions proof (planted-bloat copy still BLOCKED). Discriminator: zero prompt carries an unresolved blocking lint/audit finding AND the report's both-directions proof holds. NEVER ADD an instruction to silence a finding (AB9 keystone).
